_comment: finishing-branch-improvement-plan M1 + M3.1 hook manifest. Registers 9 hooks total.

hooks.purpose: Soft-block (advisory) for legacy mission close aliases (manual/cancelled); hard-block when finishing_branch.legacy_alias_window=closed.
Block git push --force / -f / --force-with-lease without boundary approval.
Block git reset --hard without decision gate approval.
Block git branch -D and git worktree remove without discard confirmation approval.
Advisory/block before git merge or push based on branch_status evidence in contract.
Advisory/block before gh pr create if pr_body.source_artifacts is empty.
Block harness mission close if effectiveness_review.last_gate_run_status != PASS.
Block Edit/Write tool calls targeting mission-status.yaml directly.
Record git_ops evidence to finishing-branch contract after execute commands.
